from data_generation import generate_data
from core.encryption import get_cipher
from core.avalanche.avalanche_test import run_avalanche_test

for alg in ['AES', 'DES', 'BLOWFISH', 'RC4', 'CHACHA20']:
    c = get_cipher\(alg\)
    k = c.generate_key\(\)
    d = generate_data\('random', 1024\)
    r = run_avalanche_test\(c, d, k, n_tests=50\)
    print\(f'{alg:10s}: avalanche={r[\\"mean\\"]:.4f} +/- {r[\\"std\\"]:.4f}, good={r[\\"is_good\\"]}'\)

print\('All passed!'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/Users/Ruslan/Проекты/вкр" && python -c "
from data_generation import generate_data
from core.encryption import get_cipher
from core.entropy import analyze_all
from core.statistics import analyze_all_statistics
from core.avalanche.avalanche_test import run_avalanche_test

print\('=== Data Types Entropy Spectrum ==='\)
for dt in ['zeros', 'binary', 'structured', 'text', 'image', 'incremental', 'random']:
    d = generate_data\(dt, 10240\)
    from core.entropy.shannon_entropy import calculate_shannon_entropy
    h = calculate_shannon_entropy\(d\)
    print\(f'  {dt:12s}: {h:.4f} bit/byte'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== Avalanche Effect ==='\)
for alg in ['AES', 'DES', 'BLOWFISH', 'RC4', 'CHACHA20']:
    c = get_cipher\(alg\)
    k = c.generate_key\(\)
    d = generate_data\('random', 1024\)
    r = run_avalanche_test\(c, d, k, n_tests=50\)
    status = 'GOOD' if r['is_good'] else 'BAD'
    print\(f'  {alg:10s}: {r[\\"mean\\"]:.4f} +/- {r[\\"std\\"]:.4f} [{status}]'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== Zeros Correlation Fix ==='\)
cipher = get_cipher\('AES'\)
key = cipher.generate_key\(\)
d = generate_data\('zeros', 1024\)
ct, _ = cipher.encrypt_timed\(d, key\)
stats = analyze_all_statistics\(d, ct\)
print\(f'  corr_pearson = {stats[\\"corr_pearson\\"]:.4f} \(should be 0.0, not nan\)'\)

print\(\)
print\('All OK!'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, json
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
keys = list\(data.keys\(\)\)
print\('Top-level keys:', keys\)
for k in keys:
    v = data[k]
    if isinstance\(v, list\):
        print\(f'{k}: {len\(v\)} items'\)
        if len\(v\) > 0:
            print\(f'  first item keys: {list\(v[0].keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(v[0], dict\) else type\(v[0]\)}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'{k}: {type\(v\)}'\)

    print\(f\\"  {r['rank']}. {r['algorithm']}: total={r['total_score']:.4f} entropy={r['score_entropy']:.4f} kl={r['score_kl']:.4f} aval={r['score_avalanche']:.4f} corr={r['score_corr']:.4f}\\"\)

print\(\)
print\('=== SUMMARY \(key metrics\) ==='\)
for s in data['summary']:
    print\(f\\"  {s['algorithm']}: H_cipher={s.get\('shannon_entropy_cipher',0\):.4f} KL={s.get\('kl_divergence',0\):.6f} MI={s.get\('mutual_information',0\):.6f} cond_H={s.get\('conditional_entropy',0\):.4f}\\"\)

print\(\)

    print\(f\\"  {a['algorithm']} size={a['data_size']}: mean={a['avalanche_mean']:.4f} std={a['avalanche_std']:.4f} good={a['is_good']}\\"\)

Bash(python -c "
import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\(r'C:\\Users\\Ruslan\\Проекты\\вкр\\docs\\vkr\\experiment_results.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

print\('=== RANKING ==='\)
for r in data['ranking']:
    print\(f\\"  {r['rank']}. {r['algorithm']}: total={r['total_score']:.4f} entropy={r['score_entropy']:.4f} kl={r['score_kl']:.4f} aval={r['score_avalanche']:.4f} corr={r['score_corr']:.4f}\\"\)

print\(\)
print\('=== SUMMARY ==='\)
for s in data['summary']:
    algo = s['algorithm']
    h = s.get\('shannon_entropy_cipher', 0\)
    kl = s.get\('kl_divergence', 0\)
    mi = s.get\('mutual_information', 0\)
    ce = s.get\('conditional_entropy', 0\)
    sc = s.get\('entropy_score', 0\)
    print\(f'  {algo}: H_cipher={h:.4f} KL={kl:.6f} MI={mi:.6f} cond_H={ce:.4f} score={sc:.4f}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== AVALANCHE ==='\)
for a in data['avalanche_results']:
    print\(f\\"  {a['algorithm']} sz={a['data_size']}: mean={a['avalanche_mean']:.4f} std={a['avalanche_std']:.4f} good={a['is_good']}\\"\)
")

Bash(cd "/c/Users/Ruslan/Проекты/вкр/docs/vkr" && python -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from docx import Document
doc = Document\('Диссертация.docx'\)
count = 0
for i, p in enumerate\(doc.paragraphs\):
    if '[' in p.text and ']' in p.text:
        import re
        refs = re.findall\(r'\\[\\d+\\]', p.text\)
        if refs:
            count += len\(refs\)
            print\(f'{i}: {refs} ... {p.text[:120]}'\)
            if count > 30:
                break
print\(f'\\nTotal refs found so far: {count}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/Ruslan/Проекты/вкр/docs/vkr" && python -c "
import sys, io, re
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from docx import Document
doc = Document\('Диссертация.docx'\)
in_ch2 = False
count = 0
for i, p in enumerate\(doc.paragraphs\):
    t = p.text.strip\(\)
    if '2. РАЗРАБОТКА' in t:
        in_ch2 = True
    if 'ГЛАВА 3' in t:
        in_ch2 = False
    if in_ch2:
        refs = re.findall\(r'\\[\\d+\\]', p.text\)
        if refs:
            count += len\(refs\)
print\(f'Chapter 2 refs: {count}'\)
" 2>&1)
